summary: Completed E2E testing of S-curve rating conversion and preference scoring features. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Profile tab displays avg_preference as '+X.X vs avg' in teal color for positive values. Diary/Watchlist tabs working correctly. Movie detail modal shows IMDB rating, Metascore, box office correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: S-curve conversion 0.5/5 → ~0.5/10
Backend: S-curve conversion 1.5/5 → ~2.4/10 (compressed)
Backend: S-curve conversion 2.5/5 → 5.0/10 (midpoint same as linear)
Backend: S-curve conversion 3.5/5 → ~7.9/10 (amplified from linear 7.0)
Backend: S-curve conversion 4.5/5 → ~9.4/10 (amplified from linear 9.0)
Backend: S-curve conversion 5.0/5 → 10.0/10
Backend: GET /api/user/profile-insights returns avg_preference field (not avg_rating)
Backend: Preference uses Bayesian-adjusted IMDB rating (GLOBAL_MEAN=6.5, BAYESIAN_M=1000)
Backend: Positive avg_preference = user rates higher than expected (Drama: +3.1)
Backend: Profile insights returns genres/actors/directors all with avg_preference
Backend: Bayesian formula correctly shrinks low-vote movies toward global mean
Backend: Letterboxd import uses letterboxd_to_chef_rating S-curve function
Frontend: Profile tab shows preference indicator '+X.X vs avg' in teal (positive)
Frontend: Genre insights: Drama +3.1, Thriller +3, Comedy +3.5, Music +3.5
Frontend: Director insights: Bong Joon Ho +3.5, Damien Chazelle +3.5
Frontend: Actor insights: Song Kang-ho +3.5, Lee Sun-kyun +3.5
Frontend: Diary tab shows 4 Letterboxd-imported movies with LB badges
Frontend: Diary ratings use S-curve: Fight Club 9.0, Parasite 10.0, Whiplash 10.0, Moonlight 9.0
Frontend: Watchlist tab shows 2 movies with LB badges
Frontend: Movie detail shows IMDB rating (9.2 for Godfather)
Frontend: Movie detail shows Metascore (100 for Godfather)
Frontend: Movie detail shows Box Office (Worldwide $250M, US/Canada $136M)
Frontend: Movie detail shows Awards (Won 3 Oscars)
Frontend: All tabs (Diary, Watchlist, Profile) navigation works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: S-curve formula correctly implemented: lower half uses exponent 1.4 (compression), upper half uses exponent 0.6 (amplification)
Bayesian adjustment correctly shrinks low-vote IMDB ratings toward GLOBAL_MEAN=6.5
Preference signal formula correct: user_rating - bayesian_expected(imdb_rating, imdb_votes)
Weight calculation includes +3 shift to ensure slightly-liked movies contribute positively
Frontend correctly displays preference in teal for positive, red class available for negative
MyMoviesPage.js RankedList component correctly uses avg_preference not avg_rating
test_credentials: lbtest@example.com / test1234 (existing test user with 4 diary entries)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data needed - used existing lbtest user with Letterboxd imports
context_for_next_testing_agent: S-curve conversion and preference scoring tested and verified. Key points: 1) letterboxd_to_chef_rating function at line 784 uses S-curve that compresses low ratings (1.5/5→2.4) and amplifies high ratings (4.5/5→9.4). 2) Profile insights at /api/user/profile-insights returns avg_preference field using Bayesian-adjusted IMDB ratings (GLOBAL_MEAN=6.5, BAYESIAN_M=1000). 3) Frontend MyMoviesPage.js displays preference as '+X.X vs avg' in teal color. 4) Test user lbtest@example.com has 4 diary entries (Fight Club, Parasite, Whiplash, Moonlight) showing Drama genre at +3.1 vs avg, Bong Joon Ho at +3.5. 5) Movie detail IMDB enrichment still working (Godfather: 9.2 IMDb, 100 Metascore, $250M worldwide).
